title: Political rally in Banmankhi draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Banmankhi promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Banmankhi
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Banmankhi assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.
